hero.lede: Each drop is a single curated bundle of near-expiry Japanese producers' surplus — tea, miso, shiitake. When it is gone, it is gone.

cookie_consent.body_before_link: Essential cookies keep your cart, sign-in, and region; analytics are optional — decline anytime. See our

footer.tagline: Rescued Japanese craft, shipped from Kyoto.
footer.editorial_title: Four to six times a year, we open the door.
footer.editorial_body: Each drop is a small curated set from Japanese producers — surplus craft food rescued before disposal, hand-packed in our Kyoto studio, shipped via EMS within forty-eight hours. Subscribe to be notified a day before the next release, alongside the occasional essay from the producers themselves.
footer.subscribe_note_before_link: We write sparingly — no more than once a month. One-click unsubscribe, no third-party sharing. See our
footer.studio_body_before_link: Paradigm LLC — registered in Delaware, USA. Operating brand: Sericia. Drops packed and dispatched from Kyoto, Japan; full corporate address disclosed per
footer.email_sla: Email replies within one business day.

home.hero_lede: Each drop is a single curated bundle of near-expiry Japanese producers' surplus — tea, miso, shiitake, and more. When it is gone, it is gone.

tokushoho.title: Specified Commercial Transactions Act — disclosure
tokushoho.lede: Notation required by Japan's Act on Specified Commercial Transactions (特定商取引法 Article 11). Last updated April 2026.
tokushoho.bilingual_notice_body: Japan's Act on Specified Commercial Transactions (特定商取引法 第11条) legally requires this disclosure to be published in Japanese for customers in Japan. We provide an English rendering under each row for international visitors, but the Japanese text remains the binding version.

home_sections.current_drop_title: Three rescued craft items, one curated set.
home_sections.current_drop_lede: Small-batch producers, photographed and shipped from Kyoto within 48 hours.
home_sections.makers_lede: Each drop brings together small Japanese craft producers whose surplus would otherwise be discarded. We pay them full price, photograph their work, and ship the bundle to a curious table around the world.
home_sections.philosophy_body: Japan's craft food makers produce exceptional goods on small margins. Near-expiry or overrun stock often ends up discarded. Sericia finds that stock, curates it into a single drop, and ships it to tables around the world — at a price that is kind to everyone in the chain.
home_sections.waitlist_title: The next drop, twenty-four hours early.
home_sections.waitlist_body: Drops sell out in hours. Subscribers receive the release twenty-four hours before public sale, a photographed maker's note, and a small tasting card.
home_sections.waitlist_footnote: One email per drop · Unsubscribe in a click
home_sections.how_it_works_title: From Kyoto to your door in four steps.
